title: Pungent Spicy Tunisian Vegetable Tagine
description: A spicy and crumbly one-pot Tunisian dish featuring massaman paste and namul blanch season, perfect for vegetarians. This tagine is a flavorful and aromatic stew made with a variety of vegetables and spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the massaman paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chopped zucchini and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chickpeas, vegetable broth, and namul blanch season, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Season the tagine with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot over couscous or rice.
